issue.message:
Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Forwarding a ViewModel through multiple @Composable functions should be avoided. Consider using state hoisting.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#hoist-all-the-things for more information.

Slots should be invoked in at most once place to meet lifecycle expectations. Slots should not be invoked in multiple places in source code, where the invoking location changes based on some condition. This will preserve the slot's internal state when the invoking location changes.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-invoke-slots-in-more-than-once-place for more information.
issue.errorLine1: habitBuilder: @Composable (habit: HabitWithCompletions, isDone: Boolean, isStacked: Boolean, isLocked: Boolean) -> Unit,
<string name="focusStatsSectionHeatmapSubtitle">Daily focus minutes over the last year</string>
<string name="goalDeleteContent">Are you sure you want to delete this goal and its progress log?</string>
<string name="goalDetailLabelTargetRequest">Please enter a target of at least 1</string>
<string name="goalsEmpty">No goals yet! Set a target and start logging progress</string>
<string name="taskStatsCalibrationEmpty">No sized tasks with focus time yet</string>
<string name="taskStatsCalibrationHighSpread">Your %1$s tasks vary a lot in actual time</string>
<string name="taskStatsCalibrationOrderingViolation">Your %1$s tasks take less time than %2$s ones</string>
<string name="taskStatsCalibrationSubtitle">Average focus time by task size, counting only tasks used as a focus target</string>
<string name="statsDayQualityEmpty">Rate your day from the evening checkup notification to see how your good days differ.</string>
<string name="statsDayQualityRowStats">%1$d min focus · %2$d tasks per day</string>
<string name="settingsDndPermissionDialogContent">Timety needs Do Not Disturb access to silence notifications during focus sessions. You\'ll be taken to system settings to grant it.</string>
<string name="settingsLabelKeepScreenOnSubtitle">Prevents the screen from sleeping during an active session</string>

issue.message:
`CompositionLocal`s are implicit dependencies and creating new ones should be avoided.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#compositionlocals for more information.
issue.errorLine1: /** Composition local providing the current [DateFormatSettings] to date/time-rendering composables. */

issue.message:
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

issue.errorLine1: fun SectionHeader(title: String, subtitle: String? = null) {

issue.message:
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

Composable functions should only be emitting content into the composition from one source at their top level.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-emit-multiple-pieces-of-content for more information.

Composable functions should only be emitting content into the composition from one source at their top level.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-emit-multiple-pieces-of-content for more information.

Composable functions should only be emitting content into the composition from one source at their top level.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-emit-multiple-pieces-of-content for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[mode: FocusModeEntity, phases: List<SessionPhaseEntity>, isNewMode: Boolean = false, maxNodeMins: Int = AppTheme.MAX_NODE_MINS, onCancelNew: (() -> Unit)? = null, onSaveNew: (() -> Unit)? = null, onSave: (FocusModeEntity, List<SessionPhaseEntity>) -> Unit, onDelete: (FocusModeEntity) -> Unit]` but should be `[mode: FocusModeEntity, phases: List<SessionPhaseEntity>, onSave: (FocusModeEntity, List<SessionPhaseEntity>) -> Unit, isNewMode: Boolean = false, maxNodeMins: Int = AppTheme.MAX_NODE_MINS, onCancelNew: (() -> Unit)? = null, onSaveNew: (() -> Unit)? = null, onDelete: (FocusModeEntity) -> Unit]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[goalId: String? = null, onNavigateBack: () -> Unit, goalViewModel: GoalViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory)]` but should be `[onNavigateBack: () -> Unit, goalId: String? = null, goalViewModel: GoalViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory)]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[habitId: String? = null, onNavigateBack: () -> Unit, habitViewModel: HabitViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory)]` but should be `[onNavigateBack: () -> Unit, habitId: String? = null, habitViewModel: HabitViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory)]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[viewModel: HabitViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), settingsViewModel: SettingsViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), onNavigateToHabitDetail: (String?) -> Unit, onNavigateToQuickHabits: () -> Unit = {}, onNavigateToGoals: () -> Unit = {}]` but should be `[onNavigateToHabitDetail: (String?) -> Unit, viewModel: HabitViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), settingsViewModel: SettingsViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), onNavigateToQuickHabits: () -> Unit = {}, onNavigateToGoals: () -> Unit = {}]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[modifier: Modifier = Modifier, habit: HabitEntity, isCompleted: Boolean, subtitleText: String, progressValue: Float? = null, isStacked: Boolean = false, isLocked: Boolean = false, onToggleCompleted: () -> Unit, onTap: () -> Unit, onDelete: (() -> Unit)? = null, onMarkPastCompletion: (() -> Unit)? = null, enableDismissible: Boolean = true, margin: PaddingValues = AppTheme.paddingScreenHorizontal]` but should be `[habit: HabitEntity, isCompleted: Boolean, subtitleText: String, onToggleCompleted: () -> Unit, onTap: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, progressValue: Float? = null, isStacked: Boolean = false, isLocked: Boolean = false, onDelete: (() -> Unit)? = null, onMarkPastCompletion: (() -> Unit)? = null, enableDismissible: Boolean = true, margin: PaddingValues = AppTheme.paddingScreenHorizontal]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[taskViewModel: TaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), habitViewModel: HabitViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), userViewModel: UserViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), focusViewModel: FocusViewModel = activityScopedViewModel(), settingsViewModel: SettingsViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), recurringViewModel: RecurringTaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), onNavigateToFocus: () -> Unit, onNavigateToTaskDetail: (String?) -> Unit, onNavigateToHabitDetail: (String?) -> Unit, onNavigateToRecurringDetail: (String) -> Unit = {}, onNavigateToCalendar: () -> Unit = {}, onNavigateToStatistics: () -> Unit = {}]` but should be `[onNavigateToFocus: () -> Unit, onNavigateToTaskDetail: (String?) -> Unit, onNavigateToHabitDetail: (String?) -> Unit, taskViewModel: TaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), habitViewModel: HabitViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), userViewModel: UserViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), focusViewModel: FocusViewModel = activityScopedViewModel(), settingsViewModel: SettingsViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), recurringViewModel: RecurringTaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), onNavigateToRecurringDetail: (String) -> Unit = {}, onNavigateToCalendar: () -> Unit = {}, onNavigateToStatistics: () -> Unit = {}]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[@PluralsRes pluralRes: Int, count: Int, @StringRes zeroRes: Int = 0, vararg formatArgs: Any]` but should be `[@PluralsRes pluralRes: Int, count: Int, vararg formatArgs: Any, @StringRes zeroRes: Int = 0]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[settingsViewModel: SettingsViewModel = androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.compose.viewModel( factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory ), initialQuery: String = "", onLocationSelected: (String) -> Unit, onBack: () -> Unit]` but should be `[onLocationSelected: (String) -> Unit, settingsViewModel: SettingsViewModel = androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.compose.viewModel( factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory ), initialQuery: String = "", onBack: () -> Unit]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[initialPhase: SessionPhaseEntity?, maxNodeMins: Int = AppTheme.MAX_NODE_MINS, onDismiss: () -> Unit, onSave: (PhaseType, Int) -> Unit, onDelete: (() -> Unit)? = null]` but should be `[initialPhase: SessionPhaseEntity?, onDismiss: () -> Unit, onSave: (PhaseType, Int) -> Unit, maxNodeMins: Int = AppTheme.MAX_NODE_MINS, onDelete: (() -> Unit)? = null]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[recurringTaskId: String? = null, onNavigateBack: () -> Unit, viewModel: RecurringTaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), taskViewModel: TaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory)]` but should be `[onNavigateBack: () -> Unit, recurringTaskId: String? = null, viewModel: RecurringTaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), taskViewModel: TaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory)]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[taskId: String? = null, onNavigateBack: () -> Unit, taskViewModel: TaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory)]` but should be `[onNavigateBack: () -> Unit, taskId: String? = null, taskViewModel: TaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory)]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: `[viewModel: TaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), recurringViewModel: RecurringTaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), settingsViewModel: SettingsViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), onNavigateToTaskDetail: (String?) -> Unit, onNavigateToRecurring: () -> Unit = {}, onNavigateToRecurringDetail: (String) -> Unit = {}]` but should be `[onNavigateToTaskDetail: (String?) -> Unit, viewModel: TaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), recurringViewModel: RecurringTaskViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), settingsViewModel: SettingsViewModel = viewModel(factory = AppViewModelProvider.Factory), onNavigateToRecurring: () -> Unit = {}, onNavigateToRecurringDetail: (String) -> Unit = {}]`. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.
